chapter_title: A Brief and Totally Accurate History of Unicorns
learning_objective: Students will summarize how unicorn symbolism evolved across five major historical periods and compare the cultural function the unicorn served in each era.
specification:
Type: timeline **sim-id:** unicorn-symbolism-timeline
**Library:** vis-timeline
**Status:** Specified **Bloom Taxonomy:** Understand (L2) **Bloom Verb:** Summarize, Compare **Learning Objective:** Students will summarize how unicorn symbolism evolved across five major historical periods and compare the cultural function the unicorn served in each era. Time period: 3000 BCE to 2025 CE Orientation: Horizontal scrollable timeline Eras (color-coded groups): 1. Ancient Era (3000 BCE–400 CE) — Gold background - 2500 BCE: "Indus Valley seals: unicorn as administrative brand" - 400 BCE: "Ctesias describes unicorn as real animal in India" - 77 CE: "Pliny the Elder includes unicorn in Natural History" - Symbol meaning: "Untamed nature, divine power, the unknown" 2. Medieval Era (400–1500 CE) — Deep blue background - 200 CE: "Physiologus establishes unicorn-Christ allegory" - 1000 CE: "Alicorn trade peaks across Europe" - 1495: "Hunt of the Unicorn tapestries commissioned" - Symbol meaning: "Purity, Christ, commercially valuable holiness" 3. Renaissance Era (1500–1800 CE) — Purple background - 1506: "Raphael paints Young Woman with Unicorn" - 1550: "Pharmacies sell powdered unicorn horn across Europe" - 1700: "Scientific skepticism begins to challenge unicorn existence" - Symbol meaning: "Courtly love, feminine virtue, aspirational lifestyle" 4. Industrial Era (1800–1980 CE) — Gray background - 1825: "Baron Cuvier declares unicorn anatomically impossible" - 1939: "The Last Unicorn concept enters popular fiction" - 1968: "Peter S. Beagle publishes The Last Unicorn" - Symbol meaning: "Childhood fantasy, nostalgia, acknowledged fiction" 5. Digital Era (1980–present) — Hot pink background - 2003: "My Little Pony revives unicorn as pop culture icon" - 2013: "Aileen Lee coins 'unicorn' for $1B+ startups" - 2015: "Unicorn emoji added to Unicode standard" - 2024: "1,200+ unicorn startups worldwide, most pre-revenue" - Symbol meaning: "Billion-dollar valuation, disruption, magical thinking" Interactive features: - Horizontal scroll through eras with smooth transitions - Click any event to expand a detail panel with description and an illustrative quote - Hover over era labels to see a summary of that period's unicorn symbolism - Responsive design: stacks vertically on narrow screens Visual style: Clean timeline with era bands as colored backgrounds, event markers as circles, connecting line along center axis Implementation: vis-timeline library with custom CSS for era coloring and responsive breakpoints
